# ANZ Frequent Flyer Black Credit Card

## Annual Fee
$425 per year

## Earn Rate
- Earn 1 Qantas Point per $1 spent on eligible purchases
- Earn 1 Qantas Point per $1 spent overseas

## Welcome Bonus
Earn 130,000 bonus Qantas Points when you spend $5,000 on eligible purchases in the first 3 months for new cardholders.

## Card Details
- Card network: Visa
- Purchase rate: 20.99% p.a.
- Interest free days: Up to 55 days
- Minimum credit limit: $15,000
